variants.name: 莱姆斯·卢平
variants.ability: 每个夜晚*，你要选择一名存活玩家，如果他是善良的，他死亡，然后当晚不会再有其他玩家死亡；如果他是邪恶的，你醉酒。
variants.otherNightReminder: Wake to make choose a player, the previously chosen player dies if good. They are the only player that can die tonight.
variants.flavor: People Are Disappearing Daily. If We Start Fighting Amongst Ourselves, We're Doomed.
